title: Inspecting Data Types
text: Inspecting Data Types It is possible to examine the unformatted value of a data type using the Uniface Debugger or ProcScript. For example, when a display format is to a DateTime field, the data may look like this: "12/31/2019 24:59:59" Copy But the unformatted data looks like this: 2019123124595900 Copy The unformatted value cannot be converted to a String, but It can be inspected using the Debugger or statements like: putmess vDate message/info vDate Copy The formatted values are converted to strings and can be inspected using the following ProcScript: putmess "%%(vDate)" message/info "%%(vDate)" Copy Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
